rationale.R1.3: The artifact's claims about human-level play and scores are not fully supported by the reported evidence, as some games were excluded from evaluation due to instability or sparsity issues.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact may be slightly overclaiming by stating that their agent achieves 'human-level play across all 12 Atari games' when in fact some games were excluded from evaluation.
